message:
feat(test-utils): enhance logging with steps, categories, and JSON output

- Add log categories for filtering (API, STORAGE, PARSE, VALIDATE, etc.)
- Add step-level logging with automatic step counting
- Add JSON output formatting for structured test reports
- Add createLoggingFetch wrapper for network call logging
- Add withStep helper for async operation tracking
- Add color-coded console output
- Add getLogSummary for test statistics
- Add comprehensive tests for logging utilities

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,11 +9,19 @@
 export {
   createTestLogger,
   getLogBuffer,
+  getLogBufferByCategory,
   clearLogBuffer,
   formatLogBuffer,
+  formatLogBufferAsJson,
+  getLogSummary,
   setupTestLogging,
+  createLoggingFetch,
+  withStep,
+  LogCategories,
   type LogLevel,
+  type LogCategory,
   type LogEntry,
+  type LogOptions,
 } from "./logging";
 
 // Fixtures
